results.title: Speaker urges MPs to undergo regular health screenings
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Dewan Rakyat Speaker Tan Sri Dr Johari Abdul reminded Members of Parliament to undergo regular health screenings after an MP was hospitalised at the National Heart Institute (IJN).

results.title: Phuket police launch another ‘90-day anti-drugs campaign’
results.description: PHUKET: Phuket officials have launched yet another province-wide 90-day anti-drugs campaign aimed at eliminating drug trafficking and creating “drug-free” villages and communities.

results.title: Thailand woos heat-weary Europeans with travel and air-conditioners
results.description: BANGKOK: As soaring temperatures fuel demand for cooling in Europe, Thailand is pitching itself as a source of relief, promoting rainy-season holidays while exporting more air conditioners.

results.title: Family sues Special School District over child's seclusion
results.description: A family is suing the Special School District of St. Louis County, alleging their 9-year-old son with autism and ADHD was improperly secluded dozens of times over two school years.

results.description: The U.S. military has attacked Iran after it said Tehran struck three ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The assault Wednesday came as part of an American effort that also revoked the Islamic Republic’s...

results.title: Haley Stevens Goes on Attack Against Abdul El-Sayed at Michigan Senate Debate
results.description: At their first one-on-one debate in a top Senate race, Representative Haley Stevens accused her progressive rival, Dr. Abdul El-Sayed, of being too focused on publicity as he called her a tool of corporate interests.
